document: For flower and pre-roll categories, maintain target days on hand between 21 and 35 days, and flag SKUs above 60 days for markdown planning.
When vape category sell-through drops below 0.45 units per store day for two consecutive weeks, pause reorders and shift budget to top velocity edible SKUs.
Rosin yield can improve by keeping fresh-frozen biomass below -20C before wash and using staged micron bags to reduce contaminant carryover.
Compliance responses must include state, scope, source citation, source URL, last updated date, and review status before publication.
